title: OpenIDX API Reference
description: Interactive API documentation for OpenIDX Zero Trust Access Platform

identity-service.name: Identity Service
identity-service.description: User, group, role, MFA, and identity provider management

oauth-service.name: OAuth/OIDC Service
oauth-service.description: OAuth 2.0 authorization server with OpenID Connect and SAML 2.0 support

governance-service.name: Governance Service
governance-service.description: Access reviews, certification campaigns, and policy management

provisioning-service.name: Provisioning Service
provisioning-service.description: SCIM 2.0 user and group provisioning, plus automation rules

audit-service.name: Audit Service
audit-service.description: Audit event logging, compliance reporting, and export

admin-api.name: Admin API
admin-api.description: Dashboard, system settings, application management, directory integrations

access-service.name: Access Service
access-service.description: Zero Trust access proxy with route management and session control

portal-service.name: Self-Service Portal
portal-service.description: Self-service portal for application access and group membership requests

authentication.description: JWT tokens issued by the OAuth Service
